sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69660" key="naikish/rhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ναικισήρης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n69660.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who sneers</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carps</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:222" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">222</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:90" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">90</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
